method: wc -w word counts as a lightweight prompt-size proxy
budget_notes: Generated agent prompts are compact role prompts with operation details kept in kernel files or skill capsules.
Codex prompts are intentionally smaller than Claude prompts for executable clarity.
Runtime docs summarize project rules and active state; full project-specific authority remains in prompts/meta/kernel-project.md.
PresentationWriter and SKILL-PRESENTATION-DECK are present after upstream sync.
